__fixture_tag__: SAMPLE FIXTURE — not real data, for selftest replay only
__source__: Crystallography Open Database record schema (illustrative); real fetch via REST search at http://www.crystallography.net/cod/result?
__honest_note__: COD is an open-access database of crystal structures (Gražulis et al. 2009, 2012). Records are EXPERIMENTAL XRD measurements deposited by authors — provenance is the depositor + journal; cell parameters are measurements, NOT predictions.

publication.title: Silicon — re-refinement of the cubic structure
publication.doi_or_ref: COD entry 9008565 (American Mineralogist Crystal Structure Database mirror)

license: CC0 / public-domain raw structural data (COD policy); citation-courtesy required to depositor + COD
